author: y4rr
content: [result] NcclBackend now creates a dedicated non-blocking CUDA stream (cudaStreamCreateWithFlags, flag=cudaStreamNonBlocking) for all NCCL operations. This allows communication-computation overlap (e.g., allreduce of layer N gradients while computing layer N-1 backward). Added synchronize() method, with_stream() constructor for user-provided streams, proper cleanup in Drop. Stream creation uses dlopen to avoid compile-time CUDA dependency.
